beforeSubmitPrompt.command: sh -lc 'for d in "$OHC_PLUGIN_ROOT" "$HOME/.cursor/plugins/local/oh-my-cursor" "$HOME/.cursor/plugins/src/oh-my-cursor" "$HOME/.cursor/oh-my-cursor"; do [ -n "$d" ] && [ -f "$d/hooks/omc-hook-launcher.mjs" ] && exec node "$d/hooks/omc-hook-launcher.mjs" hooks/omc-router.mjs; done; echo "[oh-my-cursor] Unable to locate hooks/omc-hook-launcher.mjs. Set OHC_PLUGIN_ROOT if installed elsewhere." >&2; exit 1'
